name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior

labels: bug

---

## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Run `python main.py --live`
2. Enter repo URL '...'
3. See error on step '...'

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11]
- Ollama version: [e.g. 0.3.1]

## Logs / Screenshots
Paste any relevant error output here.
